description_long: This rifle features a robust metal receiver with a dark finish, complemented by wooden handguards and a wooden stock, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance. The rifle is equipped with a skeletonized folding stock, which enhances portability and storage. A detachable drum magazine is fitted beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity ammunition feed. The barrel is standard length and capped with a simple muzzle device, likely a thread protector. Iron sights are mounted along the top, providing basic aiming functionality. The overall design is practical and rugged, suitable for urban environments where reliability and ease of handling are essential.
description: A rugged rifle with a wooden handguard and stock, skeletonized folding stock, drum magazine, and iron sights. Its metal and wood construction gives it a classic, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel end, iron sight, and the narrow profile of the handguard and stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden handguard, skeletonized folding stock, drum magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with more detail on the magazine and stock attachment.
